Petition For Instructions Confirming Revocation Of Trust And To Confirm Assets To Probate Estate
Off Calendar Oct-03-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Stephen McDonagh for Petitioner.

Mr. McDonagh stated that there are no objections by anyone and that the will provides that either Trustor revoke by any writing. The Petition for Instructions Confirming Revocation of Trust, etc. is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
